content: Maersk was founded in 1904 by Peter Mærsk Møller and his son Arnold Peter Møller in Svendborg, Denmark. The company started as a single steamship and has since grown to become the world's largest container shipping and supply vessel company.
raw_content: Maersk was founded in 1904 by Peter Mærsk Møller and his son Arnold Peter Møller in Svendborg, Denmark. The company started as a single steamship and has since grown to become the world's largest container shipping and supply vessel company.
